html.parser/HTMLParser/unknown_decl.name: unknown_decl
html.parser/HTMLParser/unknown_decl.description: This method is called when an unrecognized declaration is read by the parser. The data parameter will be the entire contents of the declaration inside the <![...]> markup. It is sometimes useful to be overridden by a derived class. The base class implementation does nothing.
